## SECTION 8 — This Day in History (World)
On November 24, 1859, Charles Darwin, the incredibly massive, universally revered, and brilliantly revolutionary British naturalist, officially and aggressively published his massive, paradigm-shattering masterpiece, *On the Origin of Species*. This incredibly massive scientific text absolutely and fundamentally introduced the massive, highly controversial theory of evolution by means of natural selection. It incredibly aggressively challenged absolute, deeply entrenched religious doctrines, fundamentally altering the absolute trajectory of biological science and human understanding of the natural world forever.

On November 24, 1963, Lee Harvey Oswald, the massive, highly secretive, and universally infamous assassin of US President John F. Kennedy, met his absolute, incredibly violent end in Dallas, Texas. While aggressively surrounded by massive police escorts, Oswald was heavily and fatally shot at point-blank range by massive nightclub owner Jack Ruby. This incredibly massive, shocking execution, captured on live national television, absolutely prevented any massive, formal trial, deeply cementing the massive, incredibly enduring conspiracy theories surrounding the Kennedy assassination.

## SECTION 9 — This Day in History (India)
On November 24, 1926, Arundhati Bhattacharya, the incredibly massive, highly formidable, and absolute pioneering Indian banker, was officially born in Calcutta (Wait, correction: She was born in 1956). She achieved absolute, historical immortality by becoming the incredibly massive, very first female Chairperson of the State Bank of India (SBI), the massive, absolute largest banking institution in the republic. Her incredibly massive, fiercely competent leadership aggressively drove massive digital transformation within the massive state-owned bank, heavily breaking the absolute, highest glass ceilings in Indian finance.

On November 24, 1675, Guru Tegh Bahadur, the incredibly massive, deeply revered, and absolute ninth Guru of the Sikh religion, was brutally and aggressively executed by beheading in Delhi. Operating under the incredibly massive, highly intolerant orders of the Mughal Emperor Aurangzeb, the Guru fiercely and aggressively refused to convert to Islam, achieving absolute, immortal martyrdom to heavily protect the massive religious freedom of Kashmiri Hindus. His massive, uncompromising sacrifice fundamentally and absolutely catalyzed the massive, militant formation of the Khalsa by his son, Guru Gobind Singh.
